source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA telehealth scope, Dubai purpose, licensed-provider applicability, and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
